text: 46g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: meaningfully better than typical candy. the misc ranking should reward better swaps, not just raw perfection. clear real-world role. if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. can still earn points as a better swap. the category should reward harm reduction when it is real.

now the downsides: still very much a dense treat. it cannot escape being a treat food just because it is darker. rarely deserves to be treated as a foundation food. most of these are situational, not core nutrition plays. better replacements often exist. that practical comparison matters.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
